name: Foreign Tax Credit Limitation Increase for PTEP

eligibility.description: Taxpayers receiving distributions excludable under section 959(a) who paid or accrued foreign taxes on such distributions.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Increases the section 904 foreign tax credit limitation in the year of a PTEP distribution to allow for the credit of foreign withholding taxes paid on that distribution.
